bird.name: 笑翠鳥
bird.summary: 笑翠鳥（學名：Dacelo novaeguineae），又稱為笑鴗，是澳大利亞的一種鳥類，鳴聲很像人類狂笑的聲音而得名。笑翠鳥是翠鳥科，腹部灰白交間，長尾，喙大而有力，喜歡吃老鼠以及類似大小的哺乳動物、大昆蟲、蜥蜴、小鳥、蛙和蛇。笑翠鸟主要生活在于澳大利亚东部大陆，但也已被引入…

locations.name: 澳洲東岸
locations.summary: 澳大利亚东岸（East Coast of Australia），又称为澳洲东部诸州（eastern states of Australia）或东部沿海（eastern seaboard），是指位於澳大利亚大陆东部海岸线的数个南太平洋沿岸州…

locations.name: 新西兰
locations.summary: 新西兰（英語：New Zealand）又称奥特亚罗瓦（毛利語：Aotearoa，直译：「长白云之乡」），位於太平洋西南部的主權島國，是英联邦新西蘭王國的主體部分，首都為惠灵顿，最大的城市為奧克蘭。紐西蘭主要由兩大島嶼組成：北島（Te Ik…

locations.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
locations.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州（Tasmania，發音：/tæzˈmeɪniə/；帕拉瓦卡尼語：Lutruwita），簡稱塔州，是澳大利亞唯一的島嶼州，原名范迪門地（Van Diemen's Land，又譯萬迪門蘭）。該州位於澳大利亞大陸東南方約240公里…

locations.name: 西澳大利亚州
locations.summary: 西澳大利亚州（英語：Western Australia，缩写为WA），簡稱西澳，是澳大利亚联邦的州，位於澳大利亚西部，今劃分為142個地方政府區域，幅員廣達2,525,500平方公里，佔全國總面積1/3，是澳洲面積最廣大之州，亦全球面積僅…

locations.name: Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic Birds
locations.summary: The Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic Birds, known as HANZAB, is the pre-eminent scientific reference o…

locations.name: 约克角半岛
locations.summary: 约克角半岛（英語：Cape York Peninsula）是澳大利亚東北部昆士兰州的一个半岛，其北端约克角是澳大利亚大陆的极北点。该半岛在1770年由英国航海家詹姆斯·库克以约克公爵的封号命名。 约克角距新几内亚岛约140公里，两地由托雷…

locations.name: Cape Otway
locations.summary: Cape Otway is a cape and a bounded locality of the Colac Otway Shire in southern Victoria, Australia on the Great Ocean…

locations.name: 傑拉爾頓
locations.summary: 杰拉尔顿（英語：Geraldton）是澳大利亚西澳大利亚州中西部地区最大的沿海城市，距西澳州首府--珀斯以北424公里。2015年杰拉尔顿市人口为41223人（澳大利亚国家统计局预计）， 比2011年人口普查统计人数（37160人）增长1…

locations.name: Hopetoun, Western Australia
locations.summary: Hopetoun is a town on the south coast of Western Australia in the Shire of Ravensthorpe.

locations.name: Leigh, New Zealand
locations.summary: Leigh ( ) is a coastal village in the north of the Auckland Region of New Zealand.

locations.name: Kumeū
locations.summary: Kumeū is a town in the Auckland Region, situated 25 kilometres (16 mi) north-west of the City Centre in New Zealand.

locations.name: 布里斯班
locations.summary: 布里斯班（英語：Brisbane，/ˈbrɪzbən/ ，杜爾巴語：Meaanjin，又译布里斯本）为澳大利亚昆士蘭州首府，是昆士兰州人口最多的城市。布里斯班位於澳洲本土東部，北緣陽光海岸， 南鄰國際觀光勝地黃金海岸市。布里斯班大都會是澳…

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: The territorial call is a distinctive laugh that is often delivered by several birds at the same time, and is widely used as a stock sound effect in situations that involve a jungle setting. The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern mainland Australia, but has also been introduced to parts of New Zealand, Tasmania, and Western Australia.{{cite book | title=Handbook of Australian, New Zealand and Antarctic Birds

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern Australia and has a range that extends from the Cape York Peninsula in the north to Cape Otway in the south

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern Australia and has a range that extends from the Cape York Peninsula in the north to Cape Otway in the south

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: The present range in Western Australia is southwest of a line joining Geraldton on the west coast and Hopetoun on the south coast. In Tasmania the laughing kookaburra was introduced at several locations beginning in 1906

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: The present range in Western Australia is southwest of a line joining Geraldton on the west coast and Hopetoun on the south coast. In Tasmania the laughing kookaburra was introduced at several locations beginning in 1906

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: Thomson | year=1922 | title=The Naturalisation of Animals and Plants in New Zealand | publisher=Cambridge University Press | place=Cambridge | pages=137–138 | url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/21725433 }} It now breeds in a small region on the western side of the Hauraki Gulf between Leigh and Kumeu. The usual habitat is open sclerophyll forest and woodland

relations.subject: 笑翠鳥
relations.evidence: In urban areas it is found in parks and gardens. The range of the laughing kookaburra overlaps with that of the blue-winged kookaburra in an area of eastern Queensland that extends from the Cape York Peninsula south to near Brisbane
